description: Japanese consumption tax (消費税) rate master data for the Invoice System (インボイス制度). This file is bundled with the d6e/invoice-jp app and uploaded to workspace storage at install time.

standard.applies_to: 一般的な商品・サービス

reduced.applies_to: 飲食料品（外食・酒類を除く）、定期購読の新聞

rounding.rule: 1つの適格請求書につき、税率ごとに1回のみ端数処理を行う。
